name: Crystal Planet
description: A frozen world of prismatic glass dunes and singing quartz ridges. Lightning skates across crystal spires, turning the horizon into a shifting aurora.

environment.atmosphere: Thin, ionized, and bright with static haze

pointsOfInterest.name: Crown Ridge
pointsOfInterest.detail: A ring of crown-like spires that hum in chords when the wind passes through.

pointsOfInterest.name: The Prism Well
pointsOfInterest.detail: A deep sinkhole lined with faceted ice that bends light into impossible colors.

name: Mushroom Planet
description: Towering fungal trunks form a living canopy, pulsing with soft light and drifting spores. The ground is springy, warm, and full of hidden tunnels.

environment.atmosphere: Humid and spore-rich with gentle updrafts

pointsOfInterest.name: Lantern Grove
pointsOfInterest.detail: A clearing where mushrooms glow in synchrony, mapping star patterns onto the forest floor.

pointsOfInterest.name: The Mycelium Cathedral
pointsOfInterest.detail: A vaulted network of root-arches that echoes like a drum when creatures pass above.

name: Ember Planet
tagline: Heat, ash, and glowing tides of sand.
description: A scorched planet of basalt shelves and ember dunes where heat shimmers like water. Volcanic vents exhale orange mist, and the night sky is painted by falling sparks.

environment.atmosphere: Dense with ash and warm pressure fronts

pointsOfInterest.name: The Breathing Rift
pointsOfInterest.detail: A crack in the crust that exhales in rhythmic bursts, like a giant sleeping beast.

pointsOfInterest.name: Cinder Shore
pointsOfInterest.detail: A coastline of black sand where molten beads cool into tiny pearls at the waterline.
